revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses Wikidata|P424}} ===Purpose=== This template allows you to add a link from the en.wikipedia article on a language to the Wikipedia project in that language. Just add the following code to the language article in the External links section, just before the first link: :'''''{{InterWiki|code=lang_code}}''''' Where '''''lang_code''''' is the language code as described in [[:meta:Complete list of language Wikipedias available]]. ===Examples=== Generates boxed links to sister projects: * The [[:en:Wikitext|Wikitext]]: {{InterWiki|code=simple|Simple English}} : Renders the box: {{InterWiki|code=simple|Simple English}} {{clear}} * The wikitext: ==External links== {{InterWiki|code=fr}} : Renders the second-level subheading '''External links''' followed by the box: {{InterWiki|code=fr}}{{clear}} == See also == * [[:en:Template:WikisourceWiki|Template:WikisourceWiki]] (for similarly linking to Wikisource) * [[Help:Interwiki linking]] * [[Template:ill]], for inline InterWiki links ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "article" ], "label": "Language label", "description": "The label to use for the link to Wikipedia in that Language", "example": "Simple English" }, "code": { "label": "Language code", "description": "The language code for the language of the Wikipedia being linked", "example": "es (Spanish), zh (Chinese)", "type": "string", "required": true } }, "paramOrder": [ "code", "1" ] } {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
